MOTION For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard E. Levine, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF RICHARD LEVINE, (415) 391-8177 and Denis S. Kenny, Esq., SCHERER & SMITH, (415) 433-1099 appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving party Louis Genzano. Mark C. Dosker, Esq., SQUIRE, SANDERS & DEMPSEY, (415) 954-0200, appeared on behalf of defendant and opposing party Coastal International, Inc.

ARGUED and the Court treated Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction as a motion to disqualify pursuant to CCP 128 and GRANTED the motion as such. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Mar-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark C. Dosker, Esq., SQUIRE, SANDERS & DEMPSEY, (415) 954-0200, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Coastal International, Inc. Richard E. Levine, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF RICHARD LEVINE, (415) 391-8177 and Denis S. Kenny, Esq., SCHERER & SMITH, (415) 433-1099 appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Louis Genzano.

ARGUED and the Court ORDERED arbitration pursuant to Defendant COASTAL INTERNATIONAL, INC.'s Motion to Compel Arbitration The request for attorney fees was withdrawn. (JJM/CL) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
